name: 秽土转生自愈
description: 血量低于50%时，每回合结束自愈2点生命，回到50%即停止
skillCode: var piece = context.rulePiece; if (!piece) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (battle.turn.currentPlayerId !== piece.ownerPlayerId) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (piece.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var halfHp = Math.floor(piece.maxHp / 2); if (piece.currentHp >= halfHp) return { success: false, message: '' }; var healAmt = 2; piece.currentHp += healAmt; return { success: true, message: piece.name + ' 秽土转生自愈 ' + healAmt + ' 点（' + piece.currentHp + '/' + piece.maxHp + '）' };
